title: Track uses of nosonar comments
description: This rule identifies comments containing 'nosonar' which can be used to exclude code from analysis. This can hide potential issues and reduce the effectiveness of the analysis.
impact: Reduces the effectiveness of code analysis.

noncompliant.description: A simple example of a noncompliant comment.

compliant.description: A compliant comment describing a feature to implement.

why_is_this_an_issue: Using 'nosonar' comments can hide potential issues and reduce the effectiveness of the analysis.
